message:
Add [integrations.caut] config section for usage tracking

Add CautConfig struct for caut (Cloud API Usage Tracker) integration
with the following configuration options:

- enabled: Enable/disable caut integration
- binary_path: Custom path to caut binary
- poll_interval: Usage data polling interval (default 60s)
- alert_threshold: Quota alert threshold percentage (default 80%)
- providers: Specific providers to track (empty = all)
- per_agent_tracking: Enable per-agent usage attribution
- currency: Cost display currency (default USD)

Implements bd-d9jwi.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
